prompt_text:
### Demographics: 40-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Body mass index category: Overweight
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Cholelithiasis (status post cholecystectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Lisinopril (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 81.9 kg; Height 183.6 cm; BMI 24.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 119/67 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 8.4%; 6 months ago 8.1%; 3 months ago 7.6%; current 6.7%), FPG (12 months ago 217mg/dL; 9 months ago 205mg/dL; 6 months ago 173mg/dL; 3 months ago 204mg/dL; current 135mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 81.7kg; 9 months ago 84.2kg; 6 months ago 79.9kg; 3 months ago 84.7kg; current 81.9kg), Height (12 months ago 183.6cm; 9 months ago 183.6cm; 6 months ago 183.6cm; 3 months ago 183.6cm; current 183.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 25.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 25.0kg/m²; current 24.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 119mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 67mmHg; 6 months ago 66mmHg; 3 months ago 65mmHg; current 67mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 19U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 21U/L; current 24U/L), AST (12 months ago 24U/L; 9 months ago 32U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 30U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 84mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 86mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 86mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 86mL/min/1.73m²; current 84mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 15mg/g; 9 months ago 11mg/g; 6 months ago 11mg/g; 3 months ago 15mg/g; current 14mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 79mg/dL; 9 months ago 78mg/dL; 6 months ago 82mg/dL; 3 months ago 77mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 52mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 138mg/dL; 9 months ago 118mg/dL; 6 months ago 137mg/dL; 3 months ago 132mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.8g/dL; 3 months ago 14.0g/dL; current 13.2g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
